ogTitle: Pimlico Island vs Pindaroi: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pimlico Island and Pindaroi.
heading: Pimlico Island vs Pindaroi — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pimlico Island, New South Wales and Pindaroi, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pimlico Island has a lower overall climate risk score (43/100) compared to Pindaroi (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pimlico Island or Pindaroi safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pimlico Island has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Pindaroi scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pimlico Island scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Pindaroi scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pimlico Island or Pindaroi?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pimlico Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
